---
title: Output Files Test
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      # Verify the output HTML file exists (uses the output filename stem)
      fileExists:
        outputPath: "output-files.html"
      # Verify the supporting files directory is created
      folderExists: "output-files_files"
---

This document tests that rendering creates the expected output files.

The HTML renderer should create:

1. The main output file (`output-files.html`)
2. A supporting files directory (`output-files_files/`) containing CSS and other assets
